## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::AArrowUp;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        AArrowUp { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
letter, font size, text, formatting, larger, bigger

## Categories
text, design
